tool_name: Activated Sludge Aeration Design — Oxygen Demand, Tank Volume, MLSS & Blower Power

inputs.name: Influent Total Kjeldahl Nitrogen (TKN)
inputs.note: Domestic WW: TKN ≈ 30–60 mg/L; industrial can be higher

inputs.name: Design Sludge Retention Time (SRT / θ_c)
inputs.note: Nitrification SRT > 8–12 days at 15°C; ATV-DVWK A-131 §4.2

inputs.name: Aeration System Transfer Efficiency (AE)
inputs.note: Fine bubble diffuser (submerged 4m) ≈ 1.8–2.5 kgO₂/kWh; surface aerator ≈ 1.2–1.8; coarse bubble ≈ 0.8–1.2

formulas: BOD_removed_mg_l = BOD5_influent_mg_l - BOD5_effluent_mg_l; Y_obs = 0.5 / (1 + 0.06 * SRT_days); P_x_kg_d = Q_flow_m3d * BOD_removed_mg_l * Y_obs / 1000; OD_carb_kg_d = Q_flow_m3d * BOD_removed_mg_l / 1000 - 1.42 * P_x_kg_d   // [kgO₂/day] BOD Removal & Carbonaceous Oxygen Demand (COD_carb) Reference: ATV-DVWK A-131 §5.2 — carbonaceous oxygen demand: OD_C = Q·ΔS − 1.42·P_x; Y_obs = Y/(1+k_d·SRT)

N_oxidised_mg_l = TKN_influent_mg_l * 0.85; OD_N_kg_d = Q_flow_m3d * N_oxidised_mg_l * 4.57 / 1000   // [kgO₂/day] Nitrification Oxygen Demand (OD_N) Reference: ATV-DVWK A-131 §5.3 — nitrification: 4.57 kgO₂/kg N oxidised; 85% of TKN available

OD_total_kg_d = OD_carb_kg_d + OD_N_kg_d; OD_peak_kg_h = OD_total_kg_d / 24 * 2.0   // [kgO₂/day, kgO₂/h] Total Oxygen Demand & Peak Factor Reference: Peak factor 2.0× average for diurnal load variation — WEF MOP 8 §10; blower sized for peak

VSS_fraction = 0.75; X_VSS = MLSS_mg_l * VSS_fraction; V_tank_m3 = SRT_days * P_x_kg_d * 1000 / X_VSS   // [m³] Aeration Tank Volume (V_tank) Reference: V = SRT × P_x / X_VSS — ATV-DVWK A-131 §6.1; VSS/TSS = 0.75 typical
HRT_h = V_tank_m3 / (Q_flow_m3d / 24)   // [hours] Hydraulic Retention Time (HRT) Reference: HRT = V/Q; minimum 4–6 h for BOD removal; 8–16 h for nitrification per EN 12255-7
P_blower_kw = OD_peak_kg_h / aeration_efficiency_kg_kwh   // [kW] Blower Power Requirement (P_blower) Reference: P_blower = OD_peak / AE; AE from submergence depth and diffuser SOTE per ISO 18358

V1.error_msg: SRT < 8 days with significant TKN: nitrification will be incomplete at 15°C — increase SRT to minimum 10–12 days for reliable nitrification per ATV-DVWK A-131

V2.error_msg: HRT < 4 hours: insufficient contact time for BOD removal — increase tank volume or reduce influent flow; minimum 4 h for carbonaceous removal

V3.error_msg: High MLSS with high AE assumption: alpha factor for fine bubble diffusers drops sharply above 5000 mg/L MLSS — use α ≤ 0.45 correction in actual SOTE calculation

smart_warnings.message: Peak-to-average ratio > 2.5: highly variable load — consider flow equalisation basin to reduce blower oversizing and energy cost
Blower power > 500 kW: aeration is major energy consumer — evaluate turbo blowers over lobe type (15–20% energy saving) and DO control with AMP §4.3
HRT > 20 hours: over-designed for carbonaceous removal — evaluate extended aeration (no primary clarifier) or reduce SRT to match required effluent quality
Low aeration efficiency (<1.2 kgO₂/kWh): coarse bubble or surface aerator — fine bubble diffuser upgrade typically saves 30–40% energy; evaluate capital vs operating cost
Stringent effluent BOD target with short SRT: risk of effluent quality exceedance during peak loads — increase SRT to 12–15 days to ensure robust nitrification and BOD polishing
